notes: Frozen contract for the canonical invalid-input error envelope. The live CLI is exercised against this oracle in packages/cli/test/cli/invalidInputEnvelope.test.ts; any drift (new required key, renamed class, missing text-mode header line) must fail the parity test or be reflected here intentionally.

headerLines: What the preview did: nothing; only the input was rejected.
What the recommended fix will do: take the corrected input and continue.
What it will not do: edit your project files, run live commands, or change unknown state.
